查找并替换文本，查找类型：模糊文本，描述：删除正则表达式【\\d+】匹配的内容: Find and Replace Text, Search Type: Fuzzy Text, Description: Delete content matched by regular expression 【\d+】
查找并替换文本，查找类型：精确文本，描述：将内容【我们】替换为【你们】: Find and Replace Text, Search Type: Exact Text, Description: Replace 【we】 with 【you】
查找并替换文本，查找类型：精确文本，描述：将内容【this】替换为【that】，: Find and Replace Text, Search Type: Exact Text, Description: Replace 【this】 with 【that】, Additional Options: 【Case Insensitive】【Whole Word Match】
查找并替换文本，查找类型：模糊文本，描述：使用正则表达式【\\d{11}】匹配内: Find and Replace Text, Search Type: Fuzzy Text, Description: Match content using regular expression 【\d{11}】 and replace with 【13000000000】
查找并替换文本，查找类型：模糊文本，描述：删除正则表达式【[\\u4e00-\\: Find and Replace Text, Search Type: Fuzzy Text, Description: Delete content matched by regular expression 【[\u4e00-\u9fa5]】
查找内容为空时规则无效；替换内容为空时则执行“删除”操作。支持正则表达式匹配。: When the search content is empty, the rule is invalid; when the replacement content is empty, the 'Delete' operation is performed. Regular expressions are supported.
只处理不包含公式的单元格: Process Only Cells Not Containing Formulas
包含公式的单元格处理方式: How to Handle Cells Containing Formulas
需要处理的单元格数据类型: Cell Data Type to Be Processed
自动转换为处理前的数据类型，如果转换失败，则: Automatically convert to pre-processing data type; if conversion fails, then
点击“添加文件”按钮或直接将文件/文件夹拖拽至软件界面。支持批量导入多种格式的文: Click the 'Add File' button or directly drag and drop files/folders into the software interface. Supports batch import of multiple text file formats.
您可以选择“精确查找”或“正则查找”。在查找框输入需要定位的内容，在替换框输入新: You can choose 'Exact Search' or 'Regular Expression Search'. Enter the content to locate in the search box and the new content in the replacement box (if left empty, it means delete the found content).
点击“开始批量修改”按钮，系统将根据您设定的规则顺序，依次对所有文件进行内容替换: Click the 'Start Batch Modification' button, and the system will sequentially replace or delete content in all files according to the order of your set rules.
处理完成后，您可以直接在软件中预览修改后的文件内容，或打开输出目录查看文件。: After processing, you can directly preview the modified file content in the software or open the output directory to view the files.
支持多条规则组合使用，系统将按从上到下的顺序依次执行。: Multiple rules can be used in combination; the system will execute them sequentially from top to bottom.
正则查找支持标准的 JavaScript 正则表达式语法。: Regular Expression Search supports standard JavaScript regular expression syntax.
创建一个 Excel 文件，第一列填写“查找内容”，第二列填写“替换内容”。: Create an Excel file, fill the first column with 'Search Content', and the second column with 'Replacement Content'.
在软件中导入准备好的 Excel 规则文件，以及需要处理的文本文件。: Import the prepared Excel rule file and the text files to be processed into the software.
点击开始处理，软件将根据 Excel 中的每一行规则，对所有文本文件进行批量替换: Click Start Processing, and the software will perform batch replacement operations on all text files according to each row of rules in Excel.
Excel 文件建议使用 .xlsx 格式。: Excel files are recommended to use .xlsx format.
如果替换内容为空，则表示删除查找到的内容。: If the replacement content is empty, it means delete the found content.
将需要转换编码的文本文件添加到列表中，软件会自动检测当前的编码格式。: Add text files that need encoding conversion to the list; the software will automatically detect the current encoding format.
在设置区域选择您希望转换成的目标编码（如 UTF-8, GBK 等）。: In the settings area, select the target encoding you wish to convert to (such as UTF-8, GBK, etc.).
点击转换按钮，文件将被重新编码并保存到指定目录。: Click the Convert button, and the files will be re-encoded and saved to the specified directory.
建议在转换前备份重要文件，以防编码识别错误导致乱码。: It is recommended to back up important files before conversion to prevent garbled characters caused by incorrect encoding detection.
支持批量处理大量文件。: Supports batch processing of a large number of files.
创建一个 .txt 模板文件，在需要替换的地方使用 {{变量名}} 进行标记。: 创建一个 .txt 模板文件，在需要替换的地方使用 {{变量名}} 进行标记。
准备一个 Excel 文件，表头名称需要与模板中的 {{变量名}} 保持一致。: 准备一个 Excel 文件，表头名称需要与模板中的 {{变量名}} 保持一致。
导入模板和 Excel 数据，软件将为 Excel 中的每一行数据生成一个对应的: Import the template and Excel data; the software will generate a corresponding text file for each row of data in Excel.
生成的每一行数据都会对应一个新的文件。: Each generated row of data will correspond to a new file.
文件名也可以通过模板变量来动态命名。: File names can also be dynamically named using template variables.
导入包含大量空白行的文本文件。: Import text files containing many blank lines.
您可以选择删除所有空白行，或者仅删除连续的空白行（保留一行）。: You can choose to delete all blank lines or only delete consecutive blank lines (keeping one line).
点击开始，软件将快速移除文件中的多余空行。: Click Start, and the software will quickly remove extra blank lines from the files.
此操作不可逆，建议勾选“保存到新目录”以保留原文件。: This operation is irreversible; it is recommended to check 'Save to New Directory' to keep the original file.
支持 txt, csv, log 等多种文本格式。: Supports multiple text formats such as txt, csv, log, etc.
选择是完全匹配去重，还是忽略大小写去重。: Choose whether to deduplicate by exact match or ignore case.
软件将扫描文件内容，自动移除重复出现的行，仅保留一份。: The software will scan the file content and automatically remove duplicate lines, keeping only one copy.
去重是基于“行”进行的，行内内容必须完全一致才会被视为重复。: Deduplication is based on 'lines'; only completely identical content within a line will be considered a duplicate.
选择“删除行”或“替换行”。可以指定行号（如第 1, 3, 5 行）或包含特定内: Choose 'Delete Line' or 'Replace Line'. You can specify line numbers (such as lines 1, 3, 5) or lines containing specific content.
点击开始，软件将按照您的设置批量修改文件内容。: Click Start, and the software will batch modify the file content according to your settings.
支持输入行号范围，例如 1-10。: Supports inputting line number ranges, such as 1-10.
指定在第几行之前或之后插入内容，也可以选择在文件开头或结尾插入。: Specify before or after which line to insert content; you can also choose to insert at the beginning or end of the file.
在输入框中填写需要插入的文本内容。: Fill in the text content you want to insert in the input box.
批量将内容插入到所有选定文件的指定位置。: Batch insert content into the specified position of all selected files.
支持插入多行文本。: Supports inserting multiple lines of text.
选择需要转换的 .txt 或其他纯文本文件。: Select the .txt or other plain text files to be converted.
支持转换为 Word (.docx), PDF, Excel (.xlsx),: Supports conversion to Word (.docx), PDF, Excel (.xlsx), images, and more.
根据目标格式，您可以设置字体、页面大小或排版样式。: Depending on the target format, you can set font, page size, or layout style.
点击转换，等待处理完成。: Click Convert and wait for processing to complete.
转换为 PDF 可能需要较长时间，请耐心等待。: Converting to PDF may take a long time; please be patient.
通常用于将网页保存为 Word 文档、PDF 或纯文本。: Usually used to save web pages as Word documents, PDFs, or plain text.
软件将解析 HTML 结构并尽可能保留原有的排版样式。: The software will parse the HTML structure and preserve the original layout style as much as possible.
复杂的 CSS 样式在转换过程中可能会有部分丢失，属于正常现象。: Complex CSS styles may partially get lost during conversion, which is normal.
可以将 JSON 转换为 Excel 表格（扁平化处理）或思维导图结构。: You can convert JSON to Excel table (flat processing) or mind map structure.
点击开始，获取转换后的文件。: Click Start to get the converted file.
转换为 Excel 时，嵌套过深的 JSON 对象可能会被展平或忽略。: When converting to Excel, deeply nested JSON objects may be flattened or ignored.
支持转换为带样式的 Word 文档、PDF 或 HTML。: Supports conversion to styled Word documents, PDFs, or HTML.
Markdown 语法将被解析并渲染为对应的富文本格式。: Markdown syntax will be parsed and rendered into corresponding rich text format.
按行数拆分（例如每 1000 行一个文件）或按文件数量拆分（例如平均拆分为 5: Split by number of lines (e.g., one file every 1000 lines) or by number of files (e.g., evenly split into 5 files).
软件将生成多个小文件，文件名通常会附带序号后缀。: The software will generate multiple small files, and the file names usually come with sequential suffixes.
拆分过程不会修改源文件内容。: The splitting process does not modify the source file content.
导入需要合并的一系列文本文件。: Import a series of text files to be merged.
在列表中拖动文件或使用排序功能，确定合并的先后顺序。: Drag files in the list or use the sorting function to determine the merging order.
点击合并，所有文件内容将按顺序拼接成一个新的文本文件。: Click Merge, and all file contents will be concatenated into a new text file in sequence.
可以设置是否在合并的文件之间添加分隔符或换行符。: You can set whether to add separators or line breaks between merged files.
已批量删除选中的文件: Selected files have been deleted in batch
所选文件已在列表中或格式不支持: Selected files are already in the list or the format is not supported
请检查 Excel 格式是否正确: Please check if the Excel format is correct
需要处理的单元格公式类型: Cell Formula Type to Be Processed
